summary: Iteration 23: E2E Stability Test Across All Major Pages - PASS. All critical pages load correctly. Login flow works with Supabase auth. WOW Landing shows lifecycle summary (Calibration, Business DNA, Integrations, Intelligence). Integrations page shows HubSpot and Xero as connected via Merge.dev. Minor timing issue with Data Connections tab UI rendering before API data loads - not critical.

ui_bugs.issue: Race condition - shows 'No data connections yet' briefly before mergeIntegrations state loads. After ~2-3 seconds, HubSpot and Xero correctly appear.
Takes 5-7 seconds to load lifecycle data (calibration, business DNA, integrations, intelligence cards). Shows loading spinner while data fetches.
Shows 'Connect your email to enable Watchtower' even when Outlook is connected with 24 emails synced. The emailConnected state may not be updating correctly.

/login-supabase.notes: Login form works, credentials validated, redirects to /advisor

/advisor.notes: BIQc Insights page loads with WOW Landing showing: Calibration (Agent Calibrated), Business DNA (17 facts confirmed), Integrations (3 Connected - HubSpot, Xero, outlook), Intelligence (Active). Executive Memo and Baseline Initialized sections display correctly.

/settings.notes: Page exists and loads via direct URL. Sidebar click may match wrong element due to 'SETTINGS' section divider.

/business-profile.notes: Business DNA page loads with loading spinner then content

/integrations.notes: Connected Apps tab shows CRM, Financial, HRIS, ATS, Knowledge Base categories. Data Connections tab shows HubSpot (crm) and Xero (accounting) as connected via Merge.dev after brief loading delay.

/connect-email.notes: Email page shows 'Email Account Connected' - Outlook connected to andre@thestrategysquad.com.au. Gmail shows 'Connect Gmail' button.

/soundboard.notes: MySoundBoard page loads with 'New Conversation' button, 'Start Voice Call' button, and chat interface.

/board-room.notes: Board Room loads with dark theme, shows 'BIQC - BOARD ROOM' header with date and HOME button.

/war-room.notes: Strategic Console loads full-screen with step progress (Step 7/17 visible), ACTIVE status, chat interface with questions about business geographic focus.

/operator.notes: Operator View loads with dark background and loading spinner. Page structure exists.

/intelligence-baseline.notes: Intelligence Baseline page fully functional with MONITORED DOMAINS (Finance, Sales, Operations, Team, Market toggles) and RISK SENSITIVITY (Client Risk, Team Risk with Low/Medium/High options).

action_items: Consider adding loading skeleton to Data Connections tab to avoid 'No data connections yet' flash
Fix emailConnected state check on AdvisorWatchtower - it shows 'Connect Email' warning even when Outlook is connected
Consider adding data-testid to Settings sidebar button to differentiate from SETTINGS divider label
critical_code_review_comments: Integrations.js Data Connections tab has a race condition where UI renders before mergeIntegrations state is populated - recommend adding loading state check
AdvisorWatchtower.js emailConnected state may not be syncing correctly with Outlook connection status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major pages tested and working. User andre@thestrategysquad.com.au has: Calibration COMPLETE, Business DNA with 17 facts (Professional Services, www.thestrategysquad.com), 3 Integrations connected (HubSpot, Xero, Outlook), Intelligence ACTIVE with baseline initialized. Outlook token expires 2026-02-11. Minor UI timing issue in Data Connections tab - loads briefly with empty state before showing connected integrations. Settings page accessible via direct URL or sidebar (careful with text selector matching 'SETTINGS' divider).

features_verified.wow_landing: COMPLETE - All 4 lifecycle cards showing correctly (Calibration, Business DNA, Integrations, Intelligence)

features_verified.integrations_page: COMPLETE - Connected Apps categories work, Data Connections shows HubSpot + Xero
features_verified.email_page: COMPLETE - Shows Outlook connected, Gmail connect option
features_verified.soundboard: COMPLETE - Chat interface with voice call option
features_verified.board_room: COMPLETE - Dark theme intelligence board loads
features_verified.strategic_console: COMPLETE - Full-screen chat with step progress
